title: Recipe
description: Schema for recipes in the Chapman Kitchen recipe collection.

id.description: Unique recipe identifier in kebab-case. Do not use UUIDs as filenames or IDs unless specifically requested.

version.description: Recipe schema or recipe version number. Increment when the recipe structure or content changes significantly.

description.description: A short description of the dish, including its main character and important ingredients.

country.description: The country or culinary tradition most closely associated with the recipe.

region.description: A more specific region, city or culinary tradition where appropriate.

serves.description: The number of people the recipe serves.

ingredients.description: Ingredients listed as human-readable strings. Use quantities suitable for the stated number of servings. Separate sections using an empty string if desired.

method.description: Ordered cooking instructions. Each array item should describe one clear action or stage of the recipe.

serve-with.description: The main accompaniment or accompaniments that are part of the intended serving suggestion.

optional-sides.description: Optional side dishes or additions that work well with the recipe.

planner.description: Information used by the meal planner and recipe browsing interface.

prep-time-minutes.description: Active preparation time in minutes, including passive cooking or resting time.

cook-time-minutes.description: Cooking time, including baking, simmering, steaming or other passive cooking time.

freezer-label.description: How well the finished recipe freezes and reheats.

after-work.description: Whether the recipe is practical to cook on a normal working day.

learning.description: Educational and contextual information about the recipe.

did-you-know.description: An interesting historical, cultural or culinary fact about the recipe.

what-you-will-learn.description: The main cooking technique or concept the cook can learn from making this recipe.

skills.description: Specific cooking skills practised by making this recipe.

notes.description: Practical notes specific to the recipe and the Chapman kitchen.

why-its-in-the-chapman-kitchen.description: Why this recipe is useful, interesting or appropriate for the user's recipe collection.

chapman-tips.description: Practical recipe-specific tips, including likely pitfalls and useful adaptations.

batch-cooking.description: How well the recipe works for batch cooking and freezing.

leftovers.description: Useful ways to use leftovers and how well they keep or reheat.

relationships.description: Links between this recipe and related recipes in the collection.

similar-recipes.description: Names of recipes with similar ingredients, techniques, cuisine or role in the meal planner.

history.description: Version history and changes made to the recipe over time.

date.description: Date of the change in YYYY-MM-DD format.

note.description: Description of what changed and why.

created.description: Date the recipe was first created.

updated.description: Date the recipe was last updated.

created-by.description: Person or process that created the recipe.

updated-by.description: Person or process that last updated the recipe.
